description_long: This humanoid robot features a weathered, industrial yellow exterior with visible mechanical joints and exposed components, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. Its head is large and rounded, with two prominent, glowing blue circular eyes set into a flat face, lacking a mouth or nose. The torso is compact and boxy, with various mechanical details and paneling, while the limbs are thin and segmented, showing clear articulation points at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees. The arms end in mechanical hands with finger-like extensions, and the legs terminate in broad, flat feet designed for stability. The robot's surface is marked by scratches, dirt, and signs of wear, suggesting extensive use in urban or industrial environments. Overall, the design emphasizes function and durability, with a distinctly robotic yet humanoid silhouette.
description: A weathered yellow humanoid robot with glowing blue eyes, exposed joints, and a rugged, industrial design. Its limbs are thin and articulated, and its surface shows signs of heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's large round head with glowing blue eyes, outstretched arms, and detailed torso.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the robot's head profile, thin segmented limbs, and mechanical hand structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, exposed mechanical components, and the structure of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the head's curvature, arm articulation, and the layered construction of the torso and legs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, legs straight and parallel, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated metal and plastic panels with visible mechanical details and no decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: Face features two large, glowing blue circular eyes set into a flat, featureless surface with no mouth or nose; no expressive elements or display screens visible.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; hands have articulated finger-like extensions; limbs appear rigid but highly articulated.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two large optical sensors (eyes) on the front of the head; no other sensors are clearly visible.
